arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: RB Leipzig vs. VfB Stuttgart
arts.sum: The lineups have been announced ahead of RB Leipzig's final day clash with Stuttgart, with the hosts aiming for European football.
The final Bundesliga matchday of the season is approaching and RB Leipzig will be looking to make sure they don’t miss out on European football as they host Stuttgart at…

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs. Stuttgart preview: Can die Roten Bullen sneak into Europe?
arts.sum: RB Leipzig will try to sneak into the European places when they face Stuttgart on the final day of the season.
